verdict.summary: Workflow failed 4 gating check(s). Resolve every reason below and re-run.

reasons.title: 4 HIGH-severity finding(s) present
reasons.detail: HIGH findings are release blockers regardless of category.
remediation: Open the Findings section below and resolve every HIGH item.
Re-run this auditor; the verdict should flip to PASS once all HIGH items are cleared.

reasons.title: 5 MEDIUM-severity findings (threshold: 5)
reasons.detail: A cluster of MEDIUM findings indicates systemic gaps (no retries, no error handling, weak hygiene).
remediation: Triage MEDIUM findings by category; treat each category as a single fix campaign.
Apply 'Retry on Fail' + 'Continue on Error' on all risky nodes (HTTP, DB, LLM).
Strip unused / disabled nodes; rename unclear ones.

reasons.title: No Error Workflow configured
reasons.detail: Without an Error Workflow, runtime failures are silent -- no alerts, no audit trail.
remediation: Create a dedicated Error Trigger workflow that logs the error payload and sends a notification (Slack/email/PagerDuty).
In Workflow Settings -> Error Workflow, select the workflow you just created.
Re-export and re-run the audit to confirm.

reasons.title: 3 hardcoded credential/secret finding(s)
reasons.detail: Secrets stored directly in workflow JSON travel with every export, every backup, and every git commit.
remediation: ROTATE the exposed credential immediately at the provider (assume it is leaked).
Recreate the credential inside n8n's credential store.
Replace the literal in the node with an expression that references the credential.
Add a pre-commit hook / CI step that runs this auditor or gitleaks to prevent recurrence.

findings.title: No Error Workflow configured
findings.recommendation: Create an Error Trigger workflow that logs + notifies on failures, and attach it here.

findings.title: Hardcoded Bearer token
findings.recommendation: Rotate the credential immediately if real, and store via n8n credentials.

findings.title: Hardcoded OpenAI API key
findings.recommendation: Rotate the credential immediately if real, and store via n8n credentials.

findings.title: Hardcoded AWS Access Key ID
findings.recommendation: Rotate the credential immediately if real, and store via n8n credentials.

findings.title: Risky node 'HTTP Request' has neither retryOnFail nor continueOnFail
findings.recommendation: Enable Retry on Fail, set a timeout, and consider Continue On Error.

findings.title: Node 'HTTP Request' is unreachable (no incoming connections)
findings.recommendation: Delete the node or connect it from upstream.

findings.title: Node 'Set' is unreachable (no incoming connections)
findings.recommendation: Delete the node or connect it from upstream.

findings.title: Risky node 'Code' has neither retryOnFail nor continueOnFail
findings.recommendation: Custom Code nodes throw on runtime errors; wrap in try/catch and use Continue On Error.

findings.title: Node 'Code' is unreachable (no incoming connections)
findings.recommendation: Delete the node or connect it from upstream.

findings.title: Hardcoded email address
findings.recommendation: Rotate the credential immediately if real, and store via n8n credentials.
